section_heading: Themes that sit at the center of the work.

items.title: Capital deployment with strategic intent
items.description: I focus on how capital is sequenced, where it compounds, and whether it expands the quality of future choices rather than simply funding activity.

items.title: Return quality and institutional coherence
items.description: The work is not only about growth or transaction volume. It is about durable economics, disciplined priorities, and decisions that remain coherent across cycles.

items.title: Execution discipline
items.description: I care about operating cadence, accountability, and the ability to translate strategic intent into repeatable execution without losing clarity along the way.

items.title: Decision quality under pressure
items.description: Strong operators distinguish signal from noise, align incentives with outcomes, and keep standards high when ambiguity would otherwise lower them.

items.title: Human judgment with AI leverage
items.description: I am interested in operating models where AI increases speed, coverage, and analytical range while human judgment remains responsible for direction and quality.

items.title: High-agency teams with decision velocity
items.description: The advantage is not in adopting tools superficially. It comes from building teams that use AI fluently, learn quickly, and convert insight into action with discipline.
